notes:
Đồng hành means to accompany or go together with someone, often for a period of time. It’s not just physical—can also mean supporting someone through something.

It’s a verb. You usually use it with với or cùng + person.  

It can also be used in work, projects, brands, or life journeys — like being a partner along the way.

Close meaning: đi cùng (more physical).  
Stronger emotional sense: sát cánh (stand side by side, more supportive).

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ trong chuyến đi này.

translation.en: We will accompany each other on this trip.

exampleSentences: Anh sẽ đồng hành cùng em trong chuyến đi này.
Chúng ta nên đồng hành để vượt qua khó khăn.
Bạn bè tốt luôn đồng hành với nhau suốt cuộc đời.

example.en: We will accompany each other throughout this journey.
example.vi: Chúng ta sẽ đồng hành cùng nhau trong suốt hành trình này.
example.es: Nos acompañaremos mutuamente durante este viaje.

definitions.es: Acompañar o estar al lado de alguien en un viaje o experiencia.
definitions.en: To accompany or to be alongside someone in a journey or experience.
definitions.vi: Đi cùng hoặc ở bên cạnh ai đó trong một hành trình hoặc trải nghiệm.

translation.en: We will accompany each other on this trip.

content.sentence: Chúng ta sẽ ___ trong chuyến đi này.

exampleSentencesTranslated: I will accompany you on this trip.
We should accompany each other to overcome difficulties.
Good friends always accompany each other throughout life.
notes_md:
**Đồng hành** means to accompany or go together with someone, often for a period of time. It’s not just physical—can also mean supporting someone through something.

It’s a verb. You usually use it with **với** or **cùng** + person.  

It can also be used in work, projects, brands, or life journeys — like being a partner along the way.

Close meaning: **đi cùng** (more physical).  
Stronger emotional sense: **sát cánh** (stand side by side, more supportive).
